title: Clematicissus tweedieana
taxonomy: Clematicissus tweedieana is classified within the family Vitaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as grape or vitaceous plants. This family includes various species of grapes, as well as other climbing and woody plants. The classification of this plant follows the system of binomial nomenclature, which is a universal method for naming and organizing species.
